message:
fix: guard against undefined arrays in AlertsContext evaluation loop (#9412)

All ref-based array reads (clustersRef, gpuNodesRef, podIssuesRef,
alertsRef, rulesRef, nightlyE2ERef, cronJobResultsRef) and
rule.channels are now guarded with the (data || []) pattern to
prevent crashes when localStorage returns corrupted null values
or state resets leave refs undefined.

Fixes #9406

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
